questions.question: How does OTP extraction work in MailAgent?
gold: extractOtp in src/services/extract.ts combines text and html
Runs in queue consumer processInboundEmail not in Resend webhook
Uses regex patterns and parse-otp-message fallback
Read via GET /v1/inboxes/:id/extract or MCP mailagent_extract_verification

questions.question: How do I deploy MailAgent to production?
gold: wrangler login and wrangler secret put for DATABASE_URL RESEND_API_KEY RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET API_KEY INBOX_DOMAIN
npm run deploy and npm run db:migrate
Resend webhook URL must point to POST /webhooks/resend
R2 bucket mailagent-raw-mime for raw MIME
CI deploys on push to main via deploy-worker.yml

questions.question: Why are users not receiving emails in their MailAgent inbox?
gold: Inbound path: Resend webhook enqueue queue consumer findInboxByAddress
isSenderAllowed drops mail not matching allowed_senders silently
Check Resend webhook events and INBOX_DOMAIN on address
Queue retries and DLQ mailagent-email-dlq on failures
Use GET diagnose or list messages to debug

questions.question: What is MailAgent and who is it for?
gold: Temporary inboxes for AI agents and QA E2E
OTP and magic link extraction without HTML parsing
Users: QA engineers Playwright CI MCP agents teams

questions.question: Why is OTP empty but a message exists in the inbox?
gold: Extract uses text plus html from Resend receiving API
HTML-only or unusual format may miss regex
Check links and primaryLink for magic link flows
Wrong messageIndex may read welcome email not verify email

questions.question: How does inbox creation work?
gold: Address inbox-{nanoid}@INBOX_DOMAIN or custom verified domain
ttlMinutes label callbackUrl allowed_senders from expectFrom or service preset

questions.question: What REST API endpoints exist for inboxes?
gold: GET wait events messages extract diagnose callbacks
DELETE inbox and labelPrefix bulk delete

questions.question: How is the Cloudflare Worker structured?
gold: Entry src/index.ts with fetch queue scheduled handlers
Hono routes in src/routes business logic in src/services

questions.question: What database tables are critical in MailAgent?
gold: Neon Postgres via migrations in migrations/
inboxes and messages are core tables
teams and api_keys for multi-tenant auth
migrations applied with npm run db:migrate

questions.question: What environment variables are required for the Worker?
gold: Set via wrangler secret put or .dev.vars locally
MAILAGENT_API_URL and MAILAGENT_API_KEY for MCP client in .env
